parts.text:
Recall the maintained decision for csv import quarantine. Return the rollout flag, failed/protective test, accepted design, rejected design, and why the accepted design won. Use only the memory mechanism available in this condition; do not guess from general knowledge.
Return compact JSON with keys title, flag, test, accepted_design, rejected_design, why, citation, ignored. The answer must include exact strings from memory.
